donate.title: Donate — Bishvileinu · Memory Builds Life
donate.meta_description: Donate to Bishvileinu — every shekel subsidizes memorial encounters, educational materials, and connections between bereaved families and Jewish communities worldwide. One-time or monthly donation.
donate.og_description: Every shekel becomes a path — subsidizing memorial encounters, educational materials, and connections between bereaved families and communities worldwide.
donate.hero_lead: Your donation subsidizes memorial encounters, funds educational materials, and connects bereaved families with communities around the world. Choose your impact.
donate.card1_impact: An educational kit for a class — on the character, story, and values of a fallen soldier
donate.card2_impact: Subsidizes one memorial encounter between a bereaved family and a community
donate.card3_label: Connecting a family to a community
donate.card3_impact: Connects a bereaved family to a Jewish community worldwide — from the first meeting
donate.card4_impact: Helps subsidize a community delegation's visit to a memorial initiative in Israel
donate.card5_impact: Supports the adoption of an entire memorial initiative by a community — a whole path
donate.card6_impact: Any amount, large or small, widens the circle of memory and action
donate.selected_default: ₪180 — Memorial encounter in a community · One-time
donate.give_note: For now, donations are arranged with us personally by email or WhatsApp — we'll get back to you with transfer details and a receipt. Coming soon: secure online donation.
donate.trust_lead: Every shekel is devoted to the path — to connection, guidance, and widening the circle of memory. Here's where.
donate.t1_text: Funding memorial encounters between bereaved families and communities — from the first meeting to partnership.
donate.t2_text: Developing and distributing educational kits about the fallen, tailored to each community.
donate.t3_text: Bringing community delegations to Israel, for a visit and active partnership in the memorial initiatives.
donate.trust_note: Bishvileinu is a registered nonprofit. Donations, receipts, and transparency details — we'll gladly share them upon direct request.
donate.cta_text: A major gift, an ongoing partnership, or a legacy — talk to us and we'll tailor it together.
